subject: biology
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ2.2
question_html:
The magnification of the micrograph is 2000×.

[Source: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/6/6c/HeLa_cells_stained_with_Hoechst_33258.jpg
by TenOfAllTrades.]

 

What is the maximum diameter of the nucleus in the cell labelled X?

A. 10 μm

B. 10 nm

C. 20 μm

D. 20 nm
examiners_html: Many students found it difficult to calculate the maximum diameter of the nucleus without a calculator.
